page.title: Amenokunitsuhiko Shrine (small subsidiary within Oshio Hachimangū precinct)

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24598347618|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

| deity = {{ill|Hachiman|lt=Hachiman|ar|هاتشيمان|az|Haçiman|ca|Hachiman|de|Hachiman|el|Χατσίμαν|en|Hachiman|es|Hachiman|eu|Hachiman|fa|هاچیمان|fi|Hachiman|fr|Hachiman|hu|Hacsiman|id|Hachiman|it|Hachiman|ja|八幡神|ko|하치만 신|mni|ꯍꯆꯤꯃꯥꯟ|my|ဟချိမန်း|pl|Hachiman|pt|Hachiman|ru|Хатиман|simple|Hachiman|sl|Hačiman|sv|Hachiman|tr|Hachiman|uk|Хачіман|uz|Hachiman|vi|Hachiman|wuu|八幡神|zh|八幡神|qid=Q261637|1=Hachiman}}

{{nihongo|'''Amenokunitsuhiko Shrine (small subsidiary within Oshio Hachimangū precinct)'''|大塩八幡宮境内末社天國津彦神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echizen Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Q134917286|ltq=Q134917286|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q135009906|ltq=Q135009906|qid=Q135009906|1=Massha}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}
* {{ill|Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman shrine|en|Hachiman shrine|fa|معبد هاچیمان|fr|Sanctuaire Hachiman|it|Santuario di Hachiman|ja|八幡宮|simple|Hachiman shrines|vi|Đền thờ thần Hachiman|zh|八幡宮|qid=Q11390939|1=Hachiman shrine}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11636413|ltq=Q11636413|qid=Q11636413|1=List of Shikinaisha in Echizen Province}}
** Series ordinal: 33
** P155: {{ill|Q135098992|ltq=Q135098992|qid=Q135098992|1=Isanahikono Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Amekunihimeno Shrine|lt=Amekunihimeno Shrine|qid=Q135040141|1=Amekunihimeno Shrine}}
* {{ill|Q11434131|ltq=Q11434131|qid=Q11434131|1=Ōshio Hachimangu}}
